pages.text: A vast, hazardous $(bold)Basalt Deltas$() — a forest of basalt columns, magma underfoot, and $(item)gilded blackstone$() salted through the core for $(item)gold$().
$(bold)Crafted$()$(br)A $(item)Large Badlands Skyseed$() in the centre of a 3x3 of $(item)basalt$() and $(item)gilded blackstone$().
